doNotEdit: GENERATED ARTIFACT — do not hand-edit. Regenerate with `node scripts/synthetic-coverage-manifest.mjs`. Manual edits or new real-bytes-exercised components fail `--check`.
purpose: Per-engine-family enumeration of every UNIQUE component the REAL corpora + real-bytes tests exercise, each entry DERIVED (extracted) from the named source-of-truth catalogue/enum/assertion. Basis for authoring feature-complete synthetic archives that exercise each component once (fast) instead of re-parsing whole real games (~30 min).

sources.role: utsushi RealLive module_catalog: the union of every (module_id, opcode) observed as an unresolved command across ALL scenes of both proven corpora (Sweetie HD + Kanon), evidence-first (no speculative opcodes).

kaifuu RealLive decoder element taxonomy: RealLiveOpcode element forms (framing edges: kidoku markup, command argc/overload, goto-family, choice/select-block), Expr data-lead forms (ExpressionPiece), and the opener-byte marker switch.
kaifuu RealLive bridge semantic command catalogue (NamedOpcode).
kaifuu RealLive second-level cipher cases: the compiler-version xor2/plaintext decision, pinned by the compiler_version_uses_xor2 unit assertions (110002/1110002 use xor2; 10002 plaintext).
utsushi RealLive g00 image type/edge matrix + LZSS cases.
utsushi RealLive decoder-parity set: the populated-scene counts per staged corpus the full-module linear-walk replay must decode (Sweetie HD 198, Kanon 79).

kaifuu RPG Maker MV/MZ event-command code catalogue: classify() — every top-level event `code` the extractor recognises (text-bearing, text-adjacent, and structural), exercised by the LustMemory real-bytes bundle test.
kaifuu KiriKiri XP3 capability-variant catalogue. XP3 is a container-detection surface (no bytecode opcode catalogue); its unique components are the capability variants.

kaifuu Siglus scene-bytecode opcode catalogue — currently a siglus-05 SKELETON STUB (only the Unknown catch-all; parse_scene_bytecode returns a typed not_implemented). No real opcode catalogue exists yet.
kaifuu RealLive AVG32 LZSS re-compressor (literal-only emission case).

reallive.description: RealLive (kaifuu decompiler + utsushi renderer). Proven corpora: Oshioki Sweetie HD (compiler 110002, use_xor_2) + Kanon (10002, plaintext).

rpg_maker_mv_mz.description: RPG Maker MV/MZ event-command extraction/patchback. Real corpus: LustMemory (ITOTORI_REAL_GAME_ROOT_RPG_MAKER_MV_MZ).

kirikiri_xp3.description: KiriKiri XP3 — container-detection surface. No scene-bytecode opcode catalogue; unique components are the capability variants.
kirikiri_xp3.note: Container/archive surface only: no translatable bytecode opcode catalogue exists for XP3.

siglus.note: Siglus opcode catalogue is a siglus-05 SKELETON STUB: only the `Unknown` catch-all exists and parse_scene_bytecode returns a typed not_implemented. There is NO real opcode catalogue to derive components from yet; when the real catalogue lands, its opcodes must be added here and the check will enforce it.
